name: Settlement currency—Leg 2
description: This data element reports the ISO 4217 currency code of payments that are cash settled (and not physically settled) for leg 2 of the transaction.
optionalityRules: Required, if applicable, for certain Action types (NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI).
Not-reported for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: For a USD/MYR foreign exchange transaction cash-settled in USD, Settlement currency—Leg 2 is reported as USD.
For a USD/MYR foreign exchange transaction cash-settled in GBP, Settlement currency—Leg 2 is reported as GBP.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
If reported, the format of the value conforms to the 2024 Rules specifications.
